_comment: Cross-boundary golden for the investigation filter query contract (CHAT-033). These are the canonical query bytes the SCREENS emit and the chat plane MUST match. The Python chat serializer (llm.flows.investigation.compile_query) is asserted against this fixture by services/llm/tests/test_flows_investigation.py; the web/gateway screen-query builder must consume the SAME fixture (cross-plane follow-up for web_frontend) so chat and screens cannot drift apart. Each case maps a normalized FilterSpec to its exact query string.
